name: Industrial Margin Calculator
description: Calculates gross margin and identifies hidden loss drivers using industrial engineering standards (Lean, Six Sigma, WERC).

inputs.label: Total Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total sales revenue for the period (ISO 9001 financial reporting).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total sales revenue for the period (ISO 9001 financial reporting).

inputs.label: Direct Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of raw materials directly used in production (Lean cost accounting).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of raw materials directly used in production (Lean cost accounting).

inputs.label: Direct Labor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Wages and benefits for production labor (Six Sigma labor variance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Wages and benefits for production labor (Six Sigma labor variance).

inputs.label: Manufacturing Overhead
inputs.businessContext: Indirect manufacturing costs (ISO 14000 environmental overhead allocation).

businessContext_i18n.en: Indirect manufacturing costs (ISO 14000 environmental overhead allocation).

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective units (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of defective units (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average cost to rework one defective unit (Lean waste reduction).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost to rework one defective unit (Lean waste reduction).

inputs.label: Units Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced in the period (WERC throughput metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total units produced in the period (WERC throughput metric).

inputs.label: Inventory Holding Cost Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual holding cost as percentage of inventory value (WERC warehousing standard).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual holding cost as percentage of inventory value (WERC warehousing standard).

inputs.label: Average Inventory Value
inputs.businessContext: Average value of inventory held (ISO 9001 inventory management).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average value of inventory held (ISO 9001 inventory management).

inputs.label: Logistics Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total inbound and outbound freight costs (WERC logistics benchmark).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total inbound and outbound freight costs (WERC logistics benchmark).

inputs.label: Quality System Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of quality management system (ISO 9001 compliance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of quality management system (ISO 9001 compliance).

inputs.label: Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced for the period (Lean throughput).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units produced for the period (Lean throughput).

inputs.label: Setup Time per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Time to change over equipment between batches (Lean SMED).

businessContext_i18n.en: Time to change over equipment between batches (Lean SMED).

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of units per production batch (Lean batch size reduction).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units per production batch (Lean batch size reduction).

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage including benefits (Six Sigma labor variance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage including benefits (Six Sigma labor variance).

inputs.label: Machine Downtime
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of scheduled time machine is down (OEE metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of scheduled time machine is down (OEE metric).

inputs.label: Energy Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Energy cost allocated per unit produced (ISO 50001 energy management).

businessContext_i18n.en: Energy cost allocated per unit produced (ISO 50001 energy management).

inputs.label: Warranty Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of units returned under warranty (Six Sigma customer quality).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of units returned under warranty (Six Sigma customer quality).

inputs.label: Warranty Cost per Return
inputs.businessContext: Average cost to process one warranty return (ISO 9001 customer feedback).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost to process one warranty return (ISO 9001 customer feedback).

inputs.label: Scrap Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of material scrapped (Lean waste elimination).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of material scrapped (Lean waste elimination).

inputs.label: Material Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Standard material cost per good unit (Lean cost analysis).

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard material cost per good unit (Lean cost analysis).

rules.message: Revenue must be greater than zero.
Total direct costs must not exceed revenue.
Defect rate must be between 0 and 100.
Scrap rate must be between 0 and 100.
Batch size must be greater than zero.
Units produced must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Gross margin is below 10% - immediate cost reduction needed.
Defect rate exceeds 5% - Six Sigma improvement required.
Scrap rate above 3% - Lean waste reduction opportunity.
Machine downtime exceeds 10% - OEE improvement needed.
Warranty return rate above 2% - quality system review.

formulas.description: Sum of direct material, labor, and overhead costs.
Costs due to defects, rework, scrap, and warranty.
formulas.expression: (defectRate / 100) * unitsProduced * reworkCostPerUnit + (scrapRate / 100) * unitsProduced * materialCostPerUnit + (warrantyReturnRate / 100) * unitsProduced * warrantyCostPerReturn

formulas.description: Logistics cost plus inventory holding cost.
Cost of setup time and machine downtime.

formulas.expression: totalDirectCost + qualityCost + logisticsAndInventoryCost + setupAndDowntimeCost + energyCost + qualitySystemCost

primary.label: Gross Margin (%)
primary.description: Primary result: gross margin percentage after all hidden costs.

totalDirectCost.label: Total Direct Cost
totalDirectCost.description: Sum of material, labor, and overhead.

qualityCost.label: Quality Cost
qualityCost.description: Cost of defects, rework, scrap, and warranty.

setupAndDowntimeCost.label: Setup & Downtime Cost
setupAndDowntimeCost.description: Cost of changeovers and machine downtime.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Defect Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Loss due to defects and rework.

suggestedActions.action: Implement Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defect rate below 3%.
Apply Lean waste reduction techniques to lower scrap rate.
Use SMED methodology to cut setup time by 50%.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Increase OEE and reduce cost per unit.

suggestedActions.action: Implement TPM (Total Productive Maintenance) to reduce downtime.
Adopt Just-In-Time (JIT) inventory to reduce holding costs.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Free up working capital and reduce carrying cost.

suggestedActions.action: Strengthen ISO 9001 quality management system and root cause analysis.
